_comment: Curated supporter-venue ground truth — see supporters.atlanta.json for schema. verified:false = needs a local confirmation pass before launch.

venues.name: Zeppelin Hall Beer Garden
venues.note: Large Jersey City beer hall with many screens; communal big-match viewing near the MetLife host metro.

venues.name: O'Hara's Downtown
venues.note: Downtown JC pub that opens for soccer; convenient to the PATH for fans heading to MetLife.

venues.name: Lucky 7 Tavern
venues.note: Neighborhood Jersey City tavern; shows matches on demand.
